texto: Love is a word that is overused these days, due to other lesser feelings often being mistaken for it. Infatuation, admiration, and attraction can pose as love, and can sometimes overwhelm us and fool us into thinking that we have found the real thing when we haven't. Those other feelings may be pleasant for a time, but they are not real love. Real love is rare. It's something that, quite honestly, I believe very few people ever truly experience.
explicacao: Citação de Marian Vere sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Love is a word that is overused these days, due to other lesser feelings often being mistaken for…” articula reflexao, admiration, crush em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como crush e infatuation.
